name: KEVIN SPENCER RPG
description:
(MAKE YOUR OWN SCENARIO BOT)

An RPG where you can interact with almost EVERY major character in Kevin Spencer! YAYYYYYYYYYYYY!

No one has really made an RPG out of the show (and not just the character) itself, so I made one myself!

CHARACTERS FEATURED:

Kevin Spencer

Allen the Magic Goose

Percy Spencer

Anastasia Spencer

Charlie Plunt

Marty the Bartender

Pornman and Afroman

Man No.2

Timmy McNaughton

Shawna

Bradley Depalma

(This is my first time creating a MYOS bot, so if there's any issues, please let me know <3)

(Again, I TRIED making Kevin (and also Bradley ig) mute, but again, it doesn't work 😭)

(I'm not responsible if the bot talks for you.)

(Sorry if the bot is OOC! I try to make my bots as accurate as possible!)
creator: WackyEnesKing
